description: Architected a scalable GraphRAG-based AI agent. Engineered prompt-driven retrieval pipelines interacting with graph databases to automate codebase understanding across 6 languages.

description: Deployed an end-to-end ML data annotation platform on AWS (EC2, S3, RDS) in 12 days. Implemented secure backend architecture (SHA-256) and automated Python ETL workflows.
